notes: Round-4 F2 coverage closure: 2PL IRT prediction p=sigma(a*(theta_s - b)). theta_s is the trained 2PL ability for the subject (subject_name_lookup.json gives the value directly), and (a, b) are looked up from the nearest training item by MPNet+PCA256 cosine similarity. Item discrimination a is clipped to [0,4] (raw max ~1682). IRT prediction is blended with smoothed subject_mean at BETA=0.4 (same blend ratio as sub 33). Closes the F2 (latent factor) cell of the coverage table.
